name: Fix mentor-audit BRIDGE-04 child entry surfaces in Chrome
description: Chrome BRIDGE-04 rerun fails before the bridge assertion because direct child topic/session/recap entry surfaces do not render after the test switches from Study to Family mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: the BRIDGE-04 probe depends on persisted Family mode after sign-in + switchAppMode before deep-linking, but current Chrome rerun still lands on Family-mode guard/entry-missing states for topic, session, and recap surfaces. Variants: topic route /child/:profileId/topic/:topicId must render topic-detail-screen; session route /child/:profileId/session/:sessionId must render session-metadata; recap route /recaps/:recapId must render recap-detail-screen; each must show add-to-my-learning-button, clone successfully, Open the adult copy, and browser Back must return to the original child/recap URL and testID. Regression test: apps/mobile/e2e-web/flows/mentor-audit/bridge-backstack.spec.ts passes all three surfaces against staging Chrome.
riskImpact: P1 because it keeps four flow-plan rows failing (PARENT-04, PARENT-05, PARENT-11, CC-20) and blocks confidence in v2 parent bridge return-target behavior despite deterministic route tests passing.
